creator: robk@empire.net
text:
the issue with this seems to be fixed now.
The problem was the kernel was only seeing 16meg out of 512 meg. During non busy times the system would respond fairly but under load was not able to swap out fast enough to keep up with the load.

I found the answer for this in the linux group because linux has this same problem under certian configs.

whats the syntax to fix this ? I dont know, a unix motor head did it for me but Im sure serious users will know how to fix this..
